events.description: segment opens, 'Variable Reward Schedule' subtitle fades in
'All Boring' column slides up from below — first scenario
4 gray dim notification badges pop in staggered inside boring column
'Turn them off' result label appears with X icon in boring column
'All Exciting' column slides up — second scenario with gold badges
4 bright amber notification badges pop in staggered with glow
'Check calmly' result label appears with neutral face icon
columns 1 and 2 dim to 45% opacity as focus shifts to column 3
'Random Mix' column slides up with red border glow — the addictive one
4 mixed badges (gray + amber + red) pop in with unpredictable pulsing
'Can't stop checking' warning result appears in red column
'COMPULSION' text scales up dramatically with red glow — punchline moment
